chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No. S- 569 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of Bail Application 20-02-2023 M/s Shamsuddin Ghanghro and Qurban Ali Narejo, Advocates for the applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Learned counsel for the applicant after arguing the matter at some length does not press this Crl. Bail Application; however, seeks directions to the trial Court to conclude the trial expeditiously. Learned Additional P.G for the State submits that expeditious trial is the right of an accused. Accordingly, instant Crl. Bail Application stands dismissed as not pressed; however, directions are issued to learned trial Court to proceed with the trial expeditiously and conclude the same preferably within a period of two months hereof. JUDGE Ahmad
